description: Graphic for ICE's VOICE (Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement) program, in portrait format. The left third is a teal and blue color block over a faint photo, carrying large white sans-serif text: 'If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to' followed by 'HELP' in large bold white caps. The center and right show a warm-toned stock photograph of two people's hands clasped together (one person seated, the other reaching out), with an orange angular shape in the lower-right corner. A white footer bar runs across the bottom with the phone number '1-855-48-VOICE' (blue) and 'ICE.GOV/VOICE' (orange), beside the VOICE logo (a stylized blue 'V' checkmark) and the wordmark 'VOICE - VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT.'
notable_text: If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to HELP; 1-855-48-VOICE; ICE.GOV/VOICE; VOICE - Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement
